content.query:
CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT formatcsv
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS (
        FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
        FIRST_ROW = 2,
        USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = TRUE
    )
);


create external table product
(
    product_sk varchar(4000),
    product_code varchar(4000),
    product_name varchar(4000),
    department varchar(4000),
    category varchar(4000),
    supplier_sk varchar(4000),
    list_price varchar(4000),
    uom varchar(4000)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'samples_External_files/dim_product.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = external_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = formatcsv
   
);


select * from sys.external_data_sources where name = 'external_source'

select * from  dbo.product 

SELECT * FROM sys.exteral_s
